summary: Owner approved the Social Media Management System interactive draft UI milestone.
notes: Approval covers one static frontend target branch, PR, review, clean merge, existing staging-only Netlify redeploy, and AG OS proof records. It does not authorize OAuth, social account connection, credentials, posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, Constitution changes, accepted lessons, or permanent memory.
